<insights>

- High cohesion (0.94) — files are tightly interconnected
- Excellent architectural cohesion (0.94) with minimal external dependencies (0.06 coupling)
- Contains 182 files organized around viewer components, performance optimizations, and UI foundations
- Heavy bidirectional communication with PRD Management UI suggests tight integration between dashboard shell and PRD features
- Exceptional zone cohesion of 0.94 demonstrates well-structured frontend architecture with clear component boundaries
- Performance-focused design evident from dedicated DOM update gates, response buffers, and update batchers
- Central hub position with 9 outgoing cross-zone imports suggests this zone coordinates multiple dashboard features
- Exhibits hub-and-spoke architectural pattern as central coordination point with 5+ outbound dependencies
- Asymmetric bidirectional coupling with web-middleware (9→7) suggests dashboard drives interactions while middleware provides controlled feedback
- Hub-and-spoke pattern with dashboard-frontend as central coordinator demonstrates proper UI orchestration architecture
- Zone contains 182 files spanning schema definitions, application bootstrap, and numerous UI components - suggests multiple distinct responsibilities
- Schema definition files (v1.ts) mixed with UI components indicates violation of separation of concerns
- Bootstrap entrypoint co-located with leaf UI components creates inappropriate dependency mixing
- Zone size imbalance - 182 files is excessive for a single zone and suggests multiple unrelated concerns bundled together
- Schema definitions (src/schema/v1.ts) co-located with UI components violates separation of concerns - schemas should be in dedicated zone
- Zone name 'dashboard-frontend' conflicts with actual file paths under 'viewer/' - naming inconsistency suggests zone identity confusion
- UI components use .ts extension rather than .tsx despite being React components - inconsistent with typical React conventions
- Test files co-located within zones alongside implementation files - consistent pattern across all zones but undocumented convention
- Rename zone to 'dashboard-viewer' to align with actual file paths (packages/web/src/viewer/*) and resolve naming confusion
- Consider .tsx extension for React component files to follow conventional TypeScript+React patterns
- [call graph] 2751 internal calls, 43 outgoing, 6 incoming (cohesion: 0.98, coupling: 0.02)
